materialization_ok_false_root_cause: V3 val+test nominal pool is 96 items and V4 materialized 71; cannot reach requested 128 without larger target/observed coverage or split rebuild.
paper_claim_blockers: best seed selected on eval set

v4_missing_item_reason.materialization_limit_reason: V3 no-leakage val+test pool is smaller than requested heldout count or contains slow/missing samples
